svg.title: Quorum: three-phase collective intelligence loop
svg.desc: Diagram showing Quorum's three phases — pre-meeting anonymous elicitation, live meeting intelligence overlay, and post-decision outcome tracking — feeding into a compounding Group Intelligence Profile over time.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does Quorum pre-meeting elicitation work?')
sendPrompt('What questions does Quorum send before a meeting?')
sendPrompt('What is the pre-meeting brief Quorum generates?')
sendPrompt('What does the facilitator brief contain?')
sendPrompt('How does Quorum work during a live meeting?')
sendPrompt('How does Quorum detect the HiPPO effect?')
sendPrompt('How does Quorum surface missing perspectives?')
sendPrompt('What live questions does Quorum surface?')
sendPrompt('What is a Decision Record in Quorum?')
sendPrompt('What happens after a meeting in Quorum?')
sendPrompt('How does Quorum run a post-mortem?')
sendPrompt('How does Quorum track outcome accuracy?')
sendPrompt('What is the group intelligence profile?')
sendPrompt('What is the Group Intelligence Profile and why is it the moat?')
g.text: Your team's blind spots · patterns · prediction accuracy

svg.text: compounding moat — switching means losing years of decision history
